features.name: wire declaration with negative index bound
features.description: Code should include a wire or logic signal declared with a negative index bound (e.g., [0:-1]), so that when Yosys serializes it to JSON the 'offset' field carries a negative integer value

features.name: reversed descending bit-range port
features.description: Code should include a port declared with a downward (upto) bit-range so that the MSB index is lower than the LSB index, producing a negative offset when the range starts below zero
